Dust is a very fun ffa game and i love how every character is unique to themselves and to whoever plays them but this game is full of crybabys who target you whenever they dont win updates are not frequent at all its laggy and the devs never listen to the players about ideas nor do they moderate anything so your just playing a good idea of a game full of screaming children killing you every second and i cant respond because my mic never works half the time

I would rate 3/10  and for the devs to stop using the same excuses just so you dont have to update your game

developer_response.body: A moderation system is definitely something we've been lacking. We're going to be adding this in the upcoming updates. We do read the ideas from players, but the more time we spend responding to them all, the less time we have to work on the game itself.

I love this game for how hard it is to play every character, there's so much thought that went into these move sets that other PvP games cant offer. And the community isn't that bad.

reviews.review_title: Would never recommend to anyone over 12
reviews.review_description:
This game is, without exaggeration, one of the most poorly managed and openly toxic communities I have ever come across.

The moderation is either severely understaffed, completely ineffective, or both. There are only a handful of people supposedly running this game, and they’ve already admitted they cannot keep up with what goes on. That would be understandable if the problems were occasional — but they are constant, obvious, and impossible to miss. At some point, “we can’t handle everything” stops being an explanation and starts sounding like an excuse.

The amount of harassment, verbal abuse, and flat-out disgusting behavior that gets ignored in this game is honestly embarrassing. If you can think of a slur, insult, swear word, or derogatory comment, it is probably being thrown around somewhere in chat or voice — often repeatedly, and often with no consequence. Reports seem to go nowhere, and after sending in more than enough of them myself, it becomes very clear that the system either does not work or is simply not taken seriously.

What makes it worse is that once a group of players decides to target you, that’s basically it. They spread lies, talk trash constantly, follow you from room to room, and create this weird mob mentality every time you show up. I can enter a room and immediately hear, “Oh, there he is,” and suddenly I have multiple people piling on at once like it’s some kind of performance. And for what? Because apparently this game attracts a certain type of person who mistakes harassment for personality.

What is especially ridiculous is that I am on permanent mute. I do not talk. I do not engage. I am literally unable to contribute to the drama they constantly cry about — and yet I am still harassed anyway. That alone should tell you everything you need to know about the kind of environment this game allows.

I have even suggested, politely, that there should be some kind of age verification or parental gatekeeping involved, because this is a violent game involving weapons, combat, and a community that is clearly flooded with children who should not be in spaces like this unsupervised. Apparently, though, the people running it “do not have the time” for that. Which is convenient, considering they also do not seem to have the time to moderate the player base they already have.

So if you are a parent reading this, I would strongly recommend keeping your child away from this game. And if you are an adult looking for something actually enjoyable, I would also recommend saving yourself the headache. Unless you enjoy being surrounded by immature, hostile, attention-starved players who cry the second they get the same energy back that they dish out to everyone else.

The sad part is that I have played this game for over two years, so I can admit there is one reason I stayed: the flying mechanic. That is genuinely the only thing this game does well. Flying around with one specific character feels cool — almost like a low-budget Iron Man fantasy. Beyond that, there is very little here worth defending. The graphics are not impressive, the community is awful, the moderation is weak, and the overall experience is more exhausting than entertaining.

At this point, the game is less of a game and more of a badly supervised playground full of loud, dishonest, overly dramatic children pretending they are important. And somehow, that is supposed to pass as fun.

0/10. Would not recommend to anyone.

developer_response.body: Without a doubt, the most disgusting, unhinged, and psychopathic behaviour that I've ever seen in our community has come from you. You say you don't talk, yet we've seen what you DM our players. I genuinely hope you never interact with our community again.

reviews.review_title: The game is great The community is awful

I also went in a lobby once where i killed just one person and they got mad because i killed him. Also PLEASE BUFF JACKET, I CANT DO ANYTHING WITH JUST 45 HEALTH PLEAASE

developer_response.body:
The lobby is first and foremost a free-for-all PvP arena, so players do tend to kill each other! Were players using inappropriate language? If so, be sure to use the mute icon in the scoreboard, and you can submit video/screenshots to discord so we can help remove those players from the game. Based on your description it sounds like a normal PvP lobby, where players tend to get amped up in PvP. It sounds like you enjoy the game and a 1 star review is quite hurtful for us at this stage. We'd love to have ideas for how you would like Jacket to get buffed on our Discord where we have an ideas and suggestions board. It's the best place to share feedback too, and find other players to hop in with.  

Join discord here: discord.gg/dustvr

reviews.review_description: It's good but there are a lot of toxic people
I am locked to one trash class because of your settings I cant change button inputs but this wouldn't be a problem if you didn't made the jump button so trash just make the settings better

developer_response.body: You can change button inputs in the VR headset menu itself. Though we do have input remapping in the works. You can also disable/swap joysticks in our settings if you have stick drift. Which class are you stuck as? There are at least 2 classes that work with any type of broken controller as far as we know. Multiple classes work without joysticks for example if you have major stick drift.   And it sounds like the game itself is above 1 star for you, if you join discord we can help troubleshoot any specific issue you have. Let us know how you feel about the actual gameplay though!

reviews.review_title: If the owner and the team is reading thi
reviews.review_description: And I saw videos and it looks fun and the characters are pretty cool. I’m not sure and one of the image of your game. There’s another character that’s like has claws and it’s like the golden. I’m not sure where that character is, but the rest are pretty cool and all but the problem is the bug it’s the bug. Every time I I join the game it put me in the off-line game even if I restart the game and and even if I deleted and install it. It’s still says deleting system 32 and it sa￼ys maybe our servers are down I’m not sure if this game is already taken down, but I don’t know but this bug is annoying because it useless for to join quick matches, but ￼looks fun, but it doesn’t allow me to join your online server. Just take me to off-line servers.

developer_response.body: It's your ISP. If you're playing on wifi, try hotspotting your phone and playing that way. <1% of players have this issue due to legacy architecture that certain internet providers have. You're welcomed to leave the 1 star review until we fix it (we are currently reworking networking systems to fix this issue) but it sounds like you enjoy the game/concept and 1 star reviews are extremely damaging to us at this stage. Either way, we'll have a fix soon. And if you join discord we can help you further troubleshoot your internet. For now, we recommend rebooting all routers/modems, or using mobile hotspots.  Best of luck!

reviews.review_title: This is a great game, but
reviews.review_description:
This game is great for people to find their skills in characters, but they need some things for people to be active, like opening a shop but not to pay money the currency should be daily logins like 100 a of this currency skins hats stuff like that also challenges a way to level up to learn all skills of each character put a level on there chest and if you get to the max you get a special reward for the character like a mastery if you do get a shop please this is what I want and if they add it it ruins games exclusivety horrible but there should be weekly updates like other games I also have a problem with the pc vr why would I spend 1000 dollars on two classes in a game it is foolish respectfully finnaly I would want to know about when are the next classes coming out. 
Thank you for looking at my review

developer_response.body:
Many of these things are planned! The dev team is basically 2 dudes so it takes time to add features, and there are tons of boring back end systems that have to be built before more fun stuff can be added. Some early access titles are far more finished than DUST, as we are only in Alpha 0.7, which isn't even a 'feature complete' Alpha 1.0, let alone a Beta! 

One of the best places to suggest features is on our discord, in the ideas and suggestions thread so that we can keep track of great ideas. 

Games with weekly updates are either dead simple Gtag fangames, or have millions of dollars and many developers(Orion Drift, Gorilla Tag, Animal Company, etc.) While the devs hope to have more regular updates in the future, there is still tons of work to do to get to that point.

No sure what you mean on PCVR, the PCVR version is the same as the Quest version and has access to all of the same VR classes. But screenmode only players can play as Scarab if they want to or if VR headset(s) are broken. 

Thanks for the review! If you have more ideas definitely join the discord and let us know.

developer_response.body: So certain ISPs are jank, about 1% of players have this issue right now. Try hotspotting your phone and try again! Or use a different wifi connection if you have access to someone else's internet. We are currently working on an update to fix these jank ISPs and will push it soon! If you join discord you'll be the first to know and will get an announcement about it in the coming weeks.

developer_response.body: Coop quests are planned, as well as some of your classic 'missions' like play X matches as a class and stuff. But we're focused on core game systems first.  Coop content we're very excited for though, especially the concept of 6+ players all battle giant multi-story tall bosses together. Thats the dream anyway!

reviews.review_description: I used to be able to join servers and play but now it says (are you sure you have Internet?) and I checked and I did devs pls fix this.

developer_response.body: We have a few threads on this in discord. A fix is in the works. But you can do a few things. Turn off VPNs, reboot internet hardware(router/modem), and hard reboot the VR headset. Some ISPs are jank and resetting stuff helps flush out the jank temporarily. <1% of players are having this issue but its our main focus at the moment. Join discord and share what you've tried! https://discord.gg/dustvr

reviews.review_description:
Today I got on dust and I released that they debuffed seraph, and they made his little teleport balls slow unless you have to spend 3 seconds charging my big boom teleport balls. But on a more serious note the creator refuses to acknowledge that charters like Reaper, jacket and boulder have a unfair advantage. Reaper has a unfair advantage because it has a lot of Heath with having tons of damage. While jackets are close to impossible to hit due to its small size, and speed, also they have a outrageous damage. Lastly the boulder has a unfair amount of Heath. 

In short: 
-There was nothing wrong with seraph
-Reaper needs either a health decrease or damage decrease 
-Jacket needs to be larger, or slower
-Boulder needs to be less Heath

If these would be considered it would be greatly appreciated, and I believe these would even out the battle field.

developer_response.body:
Totally valid, but Discord is the best place to share feedback like this! A 1 star review is very unhelpful for a small team compared to discussion on discord. Especially when it sounds like you enjoy the game, you just have some notes on balance. 

Do recall this is an Early Alpha test, not a full game in the slightest. It will be messier before it gets better.

Seraph was unfortunately the most powerful character, impossible to hit with all classes once a player learned the teleport. It has more changes in store. If you never faced a sweat Seraph to experience this, consider yourself lucky! Haha

Reaper isn't much of an issue in high skilled matches, though it can be rough in the social hub. But 0.7.6 introduces a safe zone to all of the hub.

Jacket is 1 hit killable by all classes. Though the class does need smoothing applied especially when a player is on shoddy wifi. (Use explosives!)

Boulder is still experimental, and the hub safe zone will solve the issue of sweaty Boulders. Otherwise he just got a health and damage debuff this patch.

All classes will change dramatically over time. Early Alpha means nothing is set in stone.

reviews.review_description:
Saw all the reviews look like fun so downloaded it and it was just as great as I thought it would be would definitely get this game and it’s free why not buy it it’s great
Love it

developer_response.body: Thanks, we're still early days and have tons of work to do but hopefully the mess is fun in the meantime!

reviews.review_description: I have only had it for one day, and it is so fun and unique in locomotion! Great job!

developer_response.body: Thanks! We are just getting started. Tons of work left to do, so much is still unfinished 😅

reviews.review_title: Tried several times, cant get into it
reviews.review_description:
I really like the idea of this, especially that it lets me play with players and playstyles I normally wouldnt engage with in VR, but every time I try it all I think is: it still needs serious work to feel like more than a beta toy.
Classes need streamlined, possibly with movement bound to body type and the rest of the controls player mappable. Everything is way too sluggish right now, everything feels heavier than it needs to (sounds, movement, visuals) and the lack of user ownership and customizability kills all monetization potential.

developer_response.body: Indeed we do label it as an Alpha for a reason! Not even in Alpha 1.0 yet so while we appreciate the feedback, many reviews assume the game to be anywhere near complete when we’ve barely scratched the surface of our main features. Glad you see the vision! Wish we could avoid low star reviews until after the game is in a more finished state. Until then I suppose we just have to accept that most players won’t fully grasp the “Alpha” concept heh. Looking forward to hearing what you think over time as the game develops.

reviews.review_description: Amazing game playing it for free feels like robbery

developer_response.body: Oh man, and we aren't even at Alpha 1.0 yet XD

reviews.review_title: Very fun but how does one play on pc?
reviews.review_description: Ive been trying to figure out how to play on Pc but it isnt on steam

developer_response.body: Google for Dust VR and check our itch.io page, or go to vrdojo.games website. Install the PC version, and then be sure your SteamVR or Oculus(Meta Quest Link) software are running, then start the game. Also be sure the default OpenXR runtime is set to your VR setup(SteamVR/Meta). If you continue having problems, join discord! vrdojo.games or https://discord.gg/dustvr and ask for help!

reviews.review_title: The most diverse vr shooter experience
reviews.review_description: This is by far the most fun and diverse vr shooter I've ever played. This game has a class for almost everyone. There is everything from joystick and gorilla tag movement on the ground to iron man and gorn type movement for the flying classes. Also, each character has some sort of movement ability like i absolutely love sparrow which has an ability that uses your bow and arrow to launch yourself in any direction and if you get really good you can time an explosive arrow right before you hit a wall at an angle to launch yourself even further. My only two gripes is that those filthy wasp shouldn't have a bomb that does 15 damage from any range since they can go so high that they can't be hit and just slowly rain bombs on you until you pop. Also, add some sort of progression, whether it be cosmetics or just a level up system. i kinda lost interest in playing the point and just end up killing as many people as possible it's really hard to play to win when you get nothing for it.

1: bring the experiment classes out of testing and put Styx, roller, and support into experiments. Bring more pc classes, like an rc car, and an rc airplane, or a security camera that can tpto walls and shoot. Or a spider bot that can climb any surface, or a mini golem that has similar movements to walksim mod in gtag, excluding flight. ID be very happy if you added these!

developer_response.body:
1. This is plan A just as soon as we have backend account systems and gamemode servers up and running. It's all inside the 2025 bucket. 
2. PC classes are planned, but being a VR first game they are low priority. You will see camera system improvements before more PC classes. But we do want a FPV Drone flight twin-stick style flying class for sure at some stage. 
3. Walk-sim style '3rd person' mods are a no go for us. VR classes are designed to be played in VR and we do not plan on building classes that work on multiple hardware-interfaces like that. While fun, they are not 'fair' to balance in a VR PvP game. If we ever have 3rd person classes, the camera itself will be an object in the game and damageable. We can't stand 3rd person PvP with invisible cameras able to see around walls and stuff ;)  But that said, a 3rd person PC class that's like a little walker bot and a floating camera above it... has been discussed many times. 

o7

reviews.review_description: I swear to god you won’t let me damage people but everyone can damage me, I will play as a golem put a fist visibly hit someone and no damage they shoot me and they kill me! No numbers no nothing, fix you dam game!

developer_response.body:
So this issue was fixed in 0.7.1 patch that just dropped! Let us know if it happens again!

Edit: here's to hoping your next time in went better!

reviews.review_description: I have had so much fun playing this game and I am so excited for the game's future! I would highly recommend playing even if you have controller drift because there are characters that don't require the joystick! In the end, one of the best VR games I've played ever.

I love this game so much it’s very good and the fact that you can play on PC makes it even better but the only thing is I feel like this game will be so much better if you had mobile if you can put PC in it, I think you can put in mobile 
￼

developer_response.body: Mobile is planned, at least for the spectator drone so you can dip in and socialize with friends. But being a small team we've got a few others things to work on first! We'll get there ;)

reviews.review_description: Good game but could have a nice community could be that you think I’m soft or something but every time I ask for help i get called a racial slur and a curse so yeah good game call of duty community

developer_response.body:
Ah bummer, yeah we can't solve for the internet. :/ I think you'll find the vast majority of lobbies aren't that way. (testing a new patch today we were in ~10 lobbies and only 1 or 2 had anything like what you experienced, but it does happen being an online game and we try to get rid of those people when we see them).  


If you check the scoreboard on the menu, you can mute other players (it shows who is speaking and what class they're playing). And we always recommend the Training room to freely figure out classes without any PvP. You can also create a custom room code in your menu to stay away from the trolls. 


Hopefully it was fun enough to give another shot sometime and hopefully not get paired with the poo poo heads out there, heh.

edit: hope your next time in went better!

reviews.review_description: just perfect

developer_response.body: Nowhere near, but we'll keep cookin'

reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing this game for basically a full day now and it’s not that great first the balancing in this game is gone awful try hitting the jacket and you’ll probably fail because it is super Duper tiny and of course the golem you can infinitely pull players towards you dealing basically dealing ￼infinite damage￼ but I do meet some really nice people. Still wish the bow had a little bit more agility because well you deal such low damage with a projectile a tiny little one, but you know this is only in alpha so I hope things change that’s all I still will be playing it a lot because this is the only game. I haven’t really completed yet. ￼ maybe I just met up with some good players a lot lol￼ (upt for some reason sometimes I get yeeted  even when there’s no golem )￼

developer_response.body:
Edit: can't wait to hear what you think after spending a few more days in! That's when the pvp metas really start revealing themselves.

Glad you found a great crew to play with! That’s what its all about. 
The Golem’s yoink has changes in the works that will make it less spammy. The Jacket has the lowest HP in the game and is weak against explosives. Force them to swoop you near geometry and hit them with an explosive or two. And it may not seem like it but the Sparrow bow is almost the highest damage output in the game, if you land your shots. The bow will be getting a charge up functionality at some stage as well. So hopefully we have eyes on the things you mentioned! If you have more ideas for balancing, join the discord. It’s also a great spot to connect with more players.

reviews.review_description: I was vary bored and I am that tipe of person that will go though the game on my headset quick and then I got dust this game is great 👍 so I do recommend it for everybody that is seeing this review.
good gimmicky gameplay but it is heavily unbalanced and unoptimised to the point you get 5-10 fps and even some crashes if there's more than 6 players

developer_response.body: Edit: The issues you mentioned, especially the crash and low fps, have been solved for months. Try it out again and let us know if you run into issues!

reviews.review_description: I tried playing found assassin but I don’t know how to move it is so bad the balanceing is so bad played a character killed entire lobby on my first go by spamming

developer_response.body:
Glad to hear you found one of the prototype classes! The assassin is super early, and we added it for fans to get a taste of things being worked on. You can always learn how to play classes in the big TRAINING door. Hover over each class in the menu to see controls. Being an early alpha we do not have a tutorial yet as each class could change wildly between now and a 1.0.  

Join discord and play with other playtesters and test your skills against others who have figured out each class!

Let us know if something is terribly broken. Discord is the best place to reach out and share suggestions.

reviews.review_description: The community was very toxic because I was new and they kept yelling at me to report me because I was doing the wrong thing but I didn't know what to do ￼ and they were cussing at me and I did not like it and I felt very uncomfortable ￼

developer_response.body: Be sure to check out the Training area next time you log in as you can try out all the classes safely. Join discord and let us know how that goes! We have lots of helpful players who love teaching new people, just ask :)

reviews.review_title: Lag sometimes but it might be good later
reviews.review_description: I tried that game and i was happy when i saw a shooting range to test the characters but when i switched characters the games freezes for a second i would like a tutorial because i dont know the control and a private shooting range because it was laggy for me but great idea for real hope i see this game with alot of players in the future

developer_response.body: We discovered the cause of that lag! It was recently patched. Let us know if you get it again or find other lag. We're on a mission!

reviews.review_description: This game as a good idea but fails to do it it’s always a 1v10 or something like that or  and the classes are not balanced

developer_response.body: Lots of changes since this review! Would love to hear if we made any improvements. There's a switch team button now as well so we're seeing far more equal team sizes in quickmatches haha!

reviews.review_description: Dust is one of the greatest games I have ever played. The diversity of different play styles/classes means there’s something for anyone. The community is awesome (and surprisingly lacking the pure toxicity that infests most vr games) and the developers actually listen to feedback, swiftly providing fixes for bugs and balancing for the different classes. Download the game and ignore the people to ignorant to see this great game. 👍
Would give it more stars if the game didn’t crash every 10 minutes. The people who made the game should only be a limited amount of the same player like there would be 1 golem, 2 jackets etc

developer_response.body: So we aren't experiencing any reported crashes anymore, and have tweaked the classes quite a bit since March 2024. Hop back in and see what you think!

reviews.review_description:
I LOVE this game, the gameplay, the mechanics, and the characters. This is amazing for an early applab game! I do have a few gripes, however:
1. one gamemode, this is expected, but boring after some time.
2. spawns on some maps are unfair and wack
3. combat in the main lobby, if you're gonna do this, an a pvp enabled zone, such as the social area
4. a character toutorial is much needed
5. anti-cheat, I have had lobbies where people are literally invisible and spam shooting faster than you normally can.
6. and finally, heavily spammable attacks, such as the sniper.
That's all I got! Your doing great!!

developer_response.body:
<3 

1. agreed! We have stuff cooking for CTF, TDM, 'scrap collection' (think quick cash from The Finals) and long term: user created modes.
2. Yup! Currently spawns are 100% random, spare some maps where there are safe spawn rooms. We are testing/working on proper respawn code.
3. YES! haha we didn't think we would blow up this soon, but definitely will disable PvP at least in the spawn room.
4. Truth. We do intend for classes to be designed such that button mashing will get you there, but a proper tutorial 'quest' is something we have on the back burner.
5. So... that wasn't cheats. Our networking is a bit busted rn haha, most of our focus will be fixing those bugs!
6. Part of why we're excited people are finding Dust is that there's no knowing what classes should be like until they're in actual combat. Our sniper could become something else entirely for example!

This review will be fun to look back on I'm sure! So much to do, so much to change, so much chaos to be had.

reviews.review_description: Best free multiplayer arena shooter on quest honestly a fun game to hop on for a little whip and it has one of the nicest vr communities. 😃
i love this game so much i got the game 3 days ago and on the first day i loved it so much but i do want to know how to play on pc

developer_response.body:
Love to hear it adam!  You can play PC by downloading the PC client from our discord or itch.io page! You can find links on our website. Or just google Dust VR :)
Hope that helps!

reviews.review_title: Great game even tho I have stick drift
reviews.review_description: When will the Styx come out please also AWSOME game recommended for people who like murder drones or cyberpunk and fighter games

developer_response.body: We try to avoid promising release dates on anything as we're focused more on core features and low level engineering at the moment. It's unfair to make up a random target. Rest assured we've been testing the Styx locomotion and some form of it will definitely find its way into the game in 2025.

reviews.review_description: This is an extremely fun game once you learn the ropes. The main problems is the balancing and lack of maps/modes. This is an early access version so i expect more in the future. Would recommend!

developer_response.body: A new map is in its final playtesting stage as we speak! But yes, we still have some core features to focus on before a steady content stream can really let loose.

reviews.review_description: This is a really fun game but I do have one issue that with the golem I can’t seem to figure out on how to use the fist fling I’m playing on vr and I don’t know if this is a bug or something

developer_response.body:
Heya glad you like it!
So if you mean the Golem's 'yoink', that's just pointing at an enemy and holding trigger, then pulling you hand back towards you to pull them in.
If you mean the A/X buttons, that's holding the button and swinging your hand the direction you want to go, then releasing. It can add a little bit extra momentum.

But, we do plan to change the A/X move at some point so it's a bit of a placeholder. 

We have a lot of playtesters who would love hopping in game to help test things out with you. Best place to find them is on our discord! And if you run into any other issues that's the quickest place to get our attention.

Cheers!

reviews.review_title: I seriously love this game so much.
reviews.review_description: This is probably the most fun game I have EVER played. The characters look awesome, they’re all super fun to use, and everyone fits a certain class. Its extremely fun and NEVER toxic. I play this game daily and its the best time i’ve had in a while.. I don’t think anyone understands how much I truly love this game.

developer_response.body: Hehe no online game is "never" toxic, but we have been very impressed with the Dust community so far. Players are very helpful to each other and even in the middle of a heated match you'll find players on opposite teams teaching each other how to play. Glad to have you with us Dark Wolf

reviews.review_description: I love this game it has a great community from what I’ve seen and although sometimes it’s hard to tell if something is a bug or a feature/feature in progress I love it but I am having a hard time trying to to figure out how to access the pc version.

Never have I seen a class based game I would rather play than dust vr, they literally found a way to balance classes that always fly, that's a crazy feat, even for an amazing developer like vrdojo, this game makes me have hope in pvp games, thank you.
